hero.subtitle: I am a software engineer combining attention to UI detail with solid backend architecture.

about.title: Software engineer with a product mindset
about.body: I design and build web systems end‑to‑end: from backend architecture and APIs, through integrations, to a polished front‑end. I focus on readable code, automation and UX that supports real business processes.
about.education: I graduated from the West Pomeranian University of Technology in Szczecin with a degree in Computer Science, specialising in Information Systems Engineering.
about.exp1Body: Designing architecture, integrating with external services, taking care of performance and security.
about.exp2Body: Translating requirements into concrete technical solutions and iteratively delivering value.

projectsSection.title: Selected systems and applications
projectsSection.body: E‑learning platforms, reservation systems, one‑page sites and portfolios — projects built with Angular and Node.js, from concept through to production.

projects.privateApp: Private internal application for the client

contact.title: Let’s talk about working together
contact.body: Fill in the form and your message will go directly to my inbox.
contact.emailError: Please provide a valid e‑mail address.
contact.messagePlaceholder: Briefly describe the project or collaboration idea.
contact.messageError: Write a few sentences to make it easier to understand the context.
contact.success: Thank you! Your message has been sent.
contact.sendError: Something went wrong while sending the message. Please try again in a moment or contact me directly via e‑mail.
contact.rateLimit: You can send another message in a moment (limit: 1 message per minute).
contact.nameTooLong: Name can be at most 100 characters.
contact.messageTooLong: Message can be at most 2000 characters.

collab.title: Step‑by‑step collaboration process
collab.description: I want the way we work together to be clear from day one – from the first call, through development, all the way to launch and ongoing improvements.
collab.step1Title: Step 1: Short call and clarifying your needs
collab.step1Body: We start with a 20–30 minute online call. We discuss the business context, goals, target audience and existing solutions. At this stage we also check whether it makes sense to work together and in what model.
collab.step2Body: Based on the call I prepare a scope proposal – main modules, key MVP features, integrations and a rough timeline. You receive a price range and my recommendation on what to start with.
collab.step3Title: Step 3: Iterative delivery with regular feedback
collab.step3Body: I work in short iterations (usually weeks). After each iteration I show a working version, collect feedback and we agree on priorities for the next step. Instead of a “big bang” launch you get continuous visibility into progress.
collab.step4Title: Step 4: Launch, handover and ongoing support
collab.step4Body: I help you bring the project to production – environments, deployment, monitoring. After launch I hand over the repository, access to tools and concise documentation. If needed, we can agree on ongoing support or further development.
